calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-26-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Thomas Huster, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Five Continents San Francisco, LLC.
Ricky Chiu, one of the partners of plaintiff Five Continents San Francisco, LLC, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Natalie Wu.
Default entered against defendant on June 13, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on July 23, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Five Continents San Francisco, LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendant Natalie Wu as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $17,650.00.
Holdover Damages - $12,904.71.
Late Fees - $3,150.00.
Costs - $435.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $34,139.71.

Plaintiff if entitled to restitution and possession of the premises located at 1199 Sutter Street, Unit A, San Francisco, CA 94133.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
